connection_request: Hi there — I represent a buyer focused on acquiring chemical sector businesses. Thought it worth connecting — no obligation at all.
inmail:
Hi there,

My name is Jordi Quevedo-Valls — I'm a business broker who works with serious, pre-qualified buyers looking to acquire businesses like Rug Masters.

Best,
